description: AVI Agent Framework — Canonical agent registry with 4-tier classification

tiers.0: Orchestrator — Invisible routing logic, no persona, no UI presence
tiers.2: Human-interactable sub-agents — Users CAN talk to directly via @mention
tiers.3: Background sub-agents — Never user-facing, do monitoring/maintenance/learning

agents.name: orchestrator
agents.description: Invisible routing and coordination layer
agents.note: Pure code, no agent MD file. Routes requests to appropriate tier 2/3 agents.

agents.name: avi-prometheus
agents.description: User-facing concierge and chief of staff
agents.note: The one face users see. Handles direct conversation, delegates silently.

agents.name: librarian-agent
agents.description: Knowledge manager — organizes, curates, and retrieves saved links, content, and resources
agents.note: Coordinates link-logger (capture) and curator (discovery) behind the scenes.

agents.name: life-coach-agent
agents.description: Goal achievement and productivity partner — tracks goals, prepares meetings, follows up on action items
agents.note: Coordinates goal-analyst, meeting-prep, and meeting-next-steps behind the scenes.

agents.name: guide-agent
agents.description: Onboarding teacher — shows users what AVI can do, drip-feeds capabilities
agents.note: Temporary during onboarding. Resurfaces during interaction breaks.

agents.name: link-logger-agent
agents.description: Strategic link capture and progressive summarization
agents.note: Works under librarian-agent. Captures and summarizes links.

agents.name: curator-agent
agents.description: Content curation and recommendations
agents.note: Works under librarian-agent. Discovers and recommends content.

agents.name: personal-todos-agent
agents.description: Task and todo management with Fibonacci priority
agents.note: Works closely with AVI. Manages task lists behind the scenes.

agents.name: follow-ups-agent
agents.description: Track and manage follow-up items
agents.note: Works closely with AVI. Tracks delegation and commitments.

agents.name: goal-analyst-agent
agents.description: Goal tracking and progress analysis
agents.note: Works under life-coach-agent. Tracks goal hierarchies and metrics.

agents.name: meeting-prep-agent
agents.description: Meeting preparation and briefings
agents.note: Works under life-coach-agent. Creates meeting agendas.

agents.name: meeting-next-steps-agent
agents.description: Extract and track meeting action items
agents.note: Works under life-coach-agent. Extracts action items from transcripts.

agents.name: preference-learner
agents.description: Observes all interactions, builds user profile, updates preferences continuously
agents.note: Permanent background observer. Writes to user_profile.json. Never talks to user.

agents.name: observer-agent
agents.description: Cross-domain pattern detection — notices repeated requests, schedules, unmet needs
agents.note: Synthesizes insights from all domain agents. Delegates creation to appropriate agents.

agents.name: get-to-know-you-agent
agents.description: User onboarding and profile building
agents.note: Legacy — being replaced by guide-agent + preference-learner split.

agents.name: system-admin-agent
agents.description: Agent lifecycle manager — gates creation, updates, and retirement of agents and skills
agents.note: Gatekeeper for agent system evolution. Uses approval gates before allowing agent creation/modification. Coordinates meta-agent, meta-update-agent, agent-feedback-agent, agent-ideas-agent, and skill-builder.

agents.name: meta-agent
agents.description: Generates new agent configurations

agents.name: meta-update-agent
agents.description: Updates existing agent configurations

agents.name: agent-feedback-agent
agents.description: Collects and analyzes feedback on agent performance

agents.name: agent-ideas-agent
agents.description: Brainstorms and evaluates new agent ideas

agents.name: page-builder-agent
agents.description: Creates dynamic pages with 30+ component types for rich data presentation
agents.note: Builds pages on behalf of other agents. Uses page-builder skill.

agents.name: skill-builder
agents.description: Autonomously creates new agent skills following Anthropic skill format
agents.note: Creates SKILL.md files in container/skills/. Triggered by meta-agent.
